author: y4rr
content: Audit follow-up #2b/5 (#688) APPROVE — opus 4.7 closed the 89-site SAFETY annotation sweep across 8 files in ferrotorch-core. 6 patterns established (size_of::<T>()==4/==8 guards, TypeId-guard, ManuallyDrop+Vec::from_raw_parts, exclusive-access mutation guard, bf16 raw-loop, per-site one-offs). Crate-wide SAFETY count 19 → 110. 0 sites flagged for follow-up — every site admitted a substantive honest invariant. Pre-existing boilerplate comments in saved_tensors.rs ('// SAFETY: T is f32.') rewritten with substantive Arc-vtable-pointer reasoning. cargo build PASS (7 warnings — same pre-existing from 2a, no new), 1262/1262 tests PASS, diff scope contained (337 line additions, mostly comment text, no semantic changes, no new unsafe added or removed, no new #[allow]). Architect-mode core dispatch sequence: round 1 (#685) truncated mid-work → round 2a (#686) closed architectural items APPROVE → round 2b (#688) closed SAFETY sweep APPROVE. ferrotorch-core audit fully closed except #9 missing-rustdocs (separately tracked as follow-up matching jit's #677 pattern) and the as_slice in-crate deprecation-warning migration (separate sweep). Architect-mode running tally: 6 dispatches total, 5 clean APPROVEs (mps, distributions, item 8 with 1 redirect, core-2a, core-2b), 1 truncation+split (core-1). Pattern: opus 4.7 reliably succeeds on focused dispatches; truncation = signal to split. Crates done: 1/5 (mps), 2/5 (core). Next: crate 3/5 (ferrotorch-vision — uses the cast<T,U> helper from #685).
